nasb.text: For they prophesy a lie to you in order to remove you far from your land; and I will drive you out and you will perish.

esv.text: For it is a lie that they are prophesying to you, with the result that you will be removed far from your land, and I will drive you out, and you will perish.

cnv.text: 因為他們向你們說虛假的預言，使你們遠離你們的土地；我要趕逐你們，你們必要滅亡。

ccb.text: 他们的预言是骗人的，只会使你们远离家园。我会赶走你们，使你们灭亡。
